steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The previous sentence claims there are “a number of diplomacy-related parades over the years.” The new sentence provides specific supporting evidence: 73 ticker-tape parades from 1886 to 2022. The transition must connect the general claim to the concrete data that proves it.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: ”In sum” introduces a summary or concluding fact that supports the claim. The other three signal the wrong relationships: contrast or consequence (Nevertheless, Hence) or restatement (In other words). That matches choice C — C is correct.
